THE VOICES OF LOVE

Stories Held in Time

Client memories scrolling through our lens

“
Also Deep, we wanted to thank you for all the hardwork that you and your team did for us throughout the wedding. Our memories are going to be created through you guys. Thanks for being so easy going and enjoying it with us. You and your team were amazing and keep up with this work.

Aashvi & Tej

Wedding Celebration

“
Best decision we made in terms of selecting your team out of many others we scouted in Vadodara. Team was friendly and captured our best moments as we needed. Our family loved all the candid videos and photos. Thanks for all your hardwork making our wedding memorable.

Mayur & Shivani

Vadodara Wedding

“
Just wanted to say a huge thank you to you and your incredible team! We're absolutely in love with the photos and videos. I honestly don't have words to express how much I loved it. Every moment, every emotion, every tiny detail was captured so beautifully.

Mansi & Prit

Main Exhibition

“
Hi @Wedding Candid (Deep Mistry) This is absolutely amazing! We loved it - thank you so much to you and your team for all your hard work and for capturing such beautiful and memorable moments. Truly, this is wonderful. Thanks again!

Dhwani & Parth

Event Day

“
We are incredibly grateful to you and you team for capturing our wedding day so beautifully. Your artistry, precision, and dedication went far beyond our expectations. Every frame reflects not only your technical excellence but also your genuine passion.

Vishwa & Vishu

Grand Wedding

300+ HEARTS CAPTURED
5.0 CLIENT TRUST

YOUR STORY, OUR LENS

Dedicated to the quiet moments, the unspoken glances, and the light that defines us. Minimalist luxury photography for those who value authenticity.
